error_signature: Agent stopped due to max iterations
title: AI Agent stopped due to max iterations error
symptom: When analyzing invoices with the AI Agent node, the process stops with the error 'Agent stopped due to max iterations' for large PDFs.
applies_when: Processing large PDF invoices (30 pages or more)
not_this_if: Error occurs with small PDFs or different node configurations
root_cause: The AI Agent node has a maximum iteration limit that can be exceeded when processing large documents. This limit is set to prevent excessive resource usage, but it may need adjustment for larger inputs.
fix_steps: Open the AI Agent node settings
If issues persist, remove the AI Agent node and re-add it to update to the latest version
Save the workflow and try again
agent_instruction: Increase the 'Max Iterations' in the AI Agent node settings and re-add the node if necessary.
